title.purpose: Week header, modal titles, primary navigation labels.

body.purpose: Modal subtitles and supplementary prose. Rare.

label.purpose: Status pills, felt buttons, tab labels, week summary pills.

mono-data.purpose: Timestamps, dates, percentages, section dividers, wordmark.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Default interactive state transitions (hover, active, border-color, opacity).

motion.name: card-expand
motion.purpose: Session card expand/collapse via grid row animation.

motion.name: progress-fill
motion.purpose: Progress bar fill width update on session status change.

motion.name: status-opacity
motion.purpose: Session card opacity transition on done/cancelled/skipped state.

breakpoints.name: desktop
breakpoints.purpose: Switches from mobile (single column, bottom tab bar, bottom-sheet modal) to desktop (sidebar layout, inline header tabs, centered dialog modal).

components.name: Session Card — Football
components.description: The primary interaction unit. Taps to complete; expands to log felt quality and notes.
components.html:
5-a-side football
19:00 – 20:00
▾
components.css: .ds-session-card { background: #0f0f1c; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #2a2a45; border-left: 4px solid #3b82f6; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s ease; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; max-width: 420px; } .ds-session-card:active { opacity: 0.75; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 13px 14px; gap: 12px; } .ds-type-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; background: #3b82f6; } .ds-card-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-card-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #eeeeff; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-card-time { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-status-btn { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #2a2a45; background: transparent; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; transition: all 0.15s ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-status-btn.ds-status-done { border-color: #22c55e; background: #22c55e18; } .ds-status-btn:hover { border-color: #6b7280; } .ds-chevron { font-size: 12px; color: #4b5563; margin-left: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Session Card — Done
components.description: Completed session state: opacity reduced to 55%, status button filled green.
components.html:
Lower body strength
08:10 – 08:40
▾
components.css: .ds-session-card { background: #0f0f1c; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #2a2a45; border-left: 4px solid #a855f7; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; max-width: 420px; } .ds-session-card.ds-card-done { opacity: 0.55; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 13px 14px; gap: 12px; } .ds-type-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-card-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #eeeeff; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-card-time { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-status-btn { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #22c55e; background: #22c55e18; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-chevron { font-size: 12px; color: #4b5563; margin-left: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Status Pills
components.description: Inline status selectors inside an expanded session card. Four states for physical sessions.
components.css: .ds-status-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; } .ds-status-pill { flex: 1; padding: 8px 6px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1.5px solid #2a2a45; background: transparent; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #6b7280; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; text-align: center; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-status-pill:hover { border-color: #3a3a5a; color: #eeeeff; } .ds-status-pill:active { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-pill-done { border-color: #22c55e; color: #22c55e; background: #22c55e14; } .ds-pill-injured { border-color: #f59e0b; color: #f59e0b; background: #f59e0b14; } .ds-pill-cancelled { border-color: #ef4444; color: #ef4444; background: #ef444414; } .ds-pill-skipped { border-color: #6b7280; color: #6b7280; background: #6b728014; }

components.name: Felt Buttons
components.description: Post-session quality rating for physical sessions. Single accent (Strength Purple) regardless of session type.
components.html: How did it feel?
components.css: .ds-felt-section { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; } .ds-felt-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #4b5563; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-felt-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-felt-btn { flex: 1; padding: 7px 4px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid #2a2a45; background: transparent; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #6b7280; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; text-align: center; } .ds-felt-btn:hover { border-color: #a855f760; color: #a855f7; } .ds-felt-btn:active { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-felt-btn.ds-felt-active { border-color: #a855f7; color: #a855f7; background: #a855f714; }

components.name: Week Navigation
components.description: Header prev/next week controls flanking the current week label.
components.css: .ds-week-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 4px 0; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-btn { background: #16162a; border: 1px solid #2a2a45; border-radius: 10px; padding: 8px 14px; color: #eeeeff; font-size: 18px; cursor: pointer; line-height: 1; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-btn:hover { background: #1e1e35; } .ds-nav-btn:active { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-week-label { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #eeeeff; flex: 1; text-align: center; }

components.name: Modal CTA Button
components.description: Full-width primary action (Start Week / Save Changes). The only component permitted to carry the gradient.
components.css: .ds-modal-btn { width: 100%; padding: 16px; border-radius: 14px; border: none; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #a855f7); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; display: block; max-width: 420px; } .ds-modal-btn:hover { opacity: 0.92; } .ds-modal-btn:active { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-modal-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f640; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Read-only data display in the All Time history view. JetBrains Mono for the number.
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: #0f0f1c; border: 1px solid #2a2a45; border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px; display: inline-block; min-width: 120px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; color: #eeeeff; line-height: 1; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Weekly completion fill. The only animated element in the main view; uses the Football-to-Purple gradient.
components.css: .ds-progress-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 0 4px; } .ds-progress-track { flex: 1; height: 3px; background: #2a2a45; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #a855f7); transition: width 0.5s ease; } .ds-progress-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview:
The interface has one job: disappear. Habitual is built for daily use by one person — a morning glance, an evening tap, a quiet record of accumulated effort. Every decision in this system asks whether it helps the user log a session faster and exit cleanly, or adds weight to what should be a frictionless ritual.

The palette is deep Midnight Ink: near-black with a cold violet undertone that reads dark and deliberate under bedroom lighting at 7am and office fluorescents at 9pm. No light mode; the physical scene forces the answer. Five category colors are the only saturation in the palette; outside of them, the system is near-monochrome. This system explicitly rejects the gamified fitness app aesthetic and the productivity SaaS chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Midnight Ink foundation with four tonal surface depths; no box-shadows
Five closed-vocabulary category colors; no other accents
Two-typeface system: Space Grotesk for all UI copy, JetBrains Mono for data only
Touch-first: 44px+ tap targets, safe-area inset awareness, iOS PWA optimized
Component states use opacity and tint shifts; never shape or size changes

rules.name: The Five Voices Rule
rules.body: Football, Strength, Speed, Cardio, and Language are a closed vocabulary of five. They identify session types and map to status signals; never repurposed for decoration or UI state outside their defined roles. No sixth accent color is permitted.

rules.name: The Gradient Exception Rule
rules.body: Exactly one gradient exists: linear-gradient on the progress fill and modal CTA. All other surfaces, buttons, and containers are flat solids.

rules.name: The Mono Reserve Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono appears only on timestamps, dates, percentages, the HABITUAL wordmark, and section dividers. Interactive copy always uses Space Grotesk. Mixing the two faces on a single interactive element is prohibited.

rules.name: The Shadow-Free Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow in this system. Depth is achieved by surface tier escalation, not shadows. The sole exception is backdrop-filter: blur(6px) on the modal overlay — structural, used once, not to be replicated decoratively.

dos: Do use the five category colors exactly as defined: Football #3b82f6, Strength #a855f7, Speed #f97316, Cardio #22c55e, Language #06b6d4.
Do use JetBrains Mono only for data: timestamps, dates, percentages, section dividers, wordmark.
Do express depth through surface tier escalation (bg → surface → surface-2 → surface-3).
Do keep all tap targets at a minimum 44x44px.
Do use opacity shifts (45–55%) to convey completed or inactive session states.
Do let the category colors do the visual work; they do not need competition from decorative accents.
donts: Don't add gamified elements: streaks, completion rings, animated confetti, motivational copy. Anti-references: MyFitnessPal, Strava.
Don't use the productivity SaaS aesthetic: light theme, identical card grids, hero-metric template. Anti-references: Notion, ClickUp.
Don't add a sixth category color or repurpose existing ones outside their defined roles.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). The gradient lives on fills and the modal CTA only.
Don't use glassmorphism beyond the modal overlay blur. Blurred-background cards or nav elements are prohibited.
Don't extend the border-left side-stripe pattern to new components.
Don't introduce a light theme or theme toggle.
Don't use box-shadow for any purpose.
